activities.name: YOKO
activities.description: Yoko in Skokie offers excellent kosher Asian cuisine in a stylish setting. Perfect for group dinner.

input.reasoning: Selected activities that perfectly match the user's specific requirements: kosher dietary needs, group dinner preference, and interest in kosher restaurants. YOKO (4.9 rating) is the highest-rated kosher restaurant and ideal for group dinners on both arrival evening (Day 1) and the main dinner on Day 2. Zalman's Hot Dogs provides an affordable kosher lunch option on Day 2. While the user expressed interest in steakhouses, none of the steakhouse candidates (Sophia Steak, STK) offer kosher options, which is a hard dietary constraint. The selected restaurants are distributed appropriately: arrival evening dinner, lunch and dinner on the full day. Total cost of $315 for 3 travelers is very reasonable. Note: YOKO is in Skokie (suburb north of Chicago) rather than the Loop, but it's the only high-quality kosher restaurant option available that meets the dietary requirements.
input.final_message_to_user: I've created a kosher dining itinerary for your 3-person group in Chicago! Your plan features YOKO, the highest-rated kosher restaurant (4.9★) offering excellent Asian cuisine in Skokie - perfect for your group dinners on both evenings. I've also included Zalman's Hot Dogs for a casual kosher lunch on Day 2. Total estimated cost is $315 for all meals. Note: While you mentioned interest in steakhouses, the kosher dietary requirement takes priority, and none of the steakhouse candidates offer kosher options. YOKO provides an upscale group dining experience that should be memorable for your trip!
